question_prompt_implicit: Which major body of water forms a bay adjacent to the locality where the well‑known search engine with a multicolored emblem was originally developed?
What is the river that flows through the city tied to the early beginnings of the corporation celebrated for its ubiquitous personal computer operating system?
Identify the mountain range associated with the western U.S. state that serves as home to the chipmaker renowned for its Core i9 processors.
What is the ocean bordering the nation whose capital city houses the headquarters of the conglomerate behind the Galaxy smartphones?
Which bay opens onto the sea near the metropolis that hosts the main offices of the electronics group responsible for the PlayStation brand?
Which U.S. state encompasses the municipality hosting the main manufacturing plant for the company famous for the Model 3 battery‑powered car?
Name the desert surrounding the metropolitan region in which the autonomous vehicle division of the well‑known search enterprise conducts many of its driving tests.
Which small lake lies directly north of the city where the firm behind the Kindle e‑reader was born?
What is the capital city of the U.S. state that houses the headquarters of the corporation producing the Snapdragon mobile processor?
What is the name of the gulf bordering the coast of the same U.S. state that hosts the headquarters of the laptop brand known for its XPS series?
Identify the river that runs through the European city serving as the regional headquarters for the company whose voice assistant goes by Alexa.
Which mountain forms the highest point on the island home to the chip fabricator supplying processors to a widely used smartphone series?
Which river runs through the government seat of the U.S. state that serves as home to the company behind the smartphone named after digital image units?
Identify the river that flows through the ancient capital where the firm that introduced the Wii gaming console is headquartered.
Which mountain marks the highest elevation in the country where the smartphone vendor employing the MIUI skin is based?
